positive: Minimalist depiction of a constellation of stylized abstract animals: a leaping fox, a graceful crescent moon, an energetic soaring hawk, and a serene owl, formed entirely by interconnected glowing geometric lines and constellations. The style is clean vector line art combined with subtle gradient glows, set against a deep, starry indigo navy background. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for a repeating print pattern or a strong centerpiece. Use cool tones (electric blue, teal, violet) contrasted with bright white glow lines. Focus on strong negative space and crisp, solid silhouettes. Studio lighting, high contrast, highly detailed illustration, designed for screen printing.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, grain, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, gradients (excessive), photorealism, 3d render, logo, trademark
